scope: Claude CLI onboarding and first-use UAT for Borg in Telegram channel delivery flow

acceptance_gates.name: Install + binary availability
acceptance_gates.fail_criteria: Either command missing or non-zero exit

acceptance_gates.name: MCP config wiring
acceptance_gates.pass_criteria: Claude config contains a borg server entry using borg-mcp or python -m borg.integrations.mcp_server

acceptance_gates.name: Observe guidance
acceptance_gates.pass_criteria: `borg_observe` returns actionable guidance for a supplied task

acceptance_gates.name: Apply lifecycle
acceptance_gates.pass_criteria: start/checkpoint/complete cycle executes without schema errors

acceptance_gates.name: Feedback writeback
acceptance_gates.pass_criteria: feedback submission accepted for completed session

acceptance_gates.name: Telegram-safe output
acceptance_gates.pass_criteria: Message payloads are concise, markdown-safe, and include deterministic status markers
acceptance_gates.fail_criteria: Broken formatting, missing status markers, or excessively long unsafe output

acceptance_gates.name: Failure-mode clarity
acceptance_gates.pass_criteria: Known blocker classes map to clear user-facing remediation text
acceptance_gates.fail_criteria: Ambiguous errors or no remediation guidance

acceptance_gates.name: No legacy-home dependency
acceptance_gates.pass_criteria: No runtime links or guidance depend on old/legacy home URLs
acceptance_gates.fail_criteria: Any UAT-critical path references retired host as required dependency

test_plan.name: MCP observe/apply/feedback cycle
test_plan.expected: all calls succeed with session continuity

test_plan.name: Telegram channel acceptance
test_plan.expected: messages render correctly and remain operator-readable

release_blockers: missing mcp tool discovery in claude cli
non-deterministic or malformed telegram message format
runtime dependency on retired legacy home

go_no_go_policy.go: All gates G1-G9 pass and test evidence exists in session artifacts
go_no_go_policy.no_go: Any single gate fails or evidence is missing
go_no_go_policy.ship_condition: Only ship externally when GO; otherwise block release and remediate
